dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S4753 IS: Port Modernization and Supply Chain Protection Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Lee introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Commerce, Science, and Transportation

form.official-title: To repeal the requirements of the Foreign Dredge Act of 1906 with respect to dredging and dredged material.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Port Modernization and Supply Chain Protection Act.

subsection.text: Section 55109 of title 46, United States Code, is repealed.

subsection.header: Excluding dredged material from transportation requirements
subsection.text: Section 55110 of title 46, United States Code, is amended—

paragraph.text: in the section heading, by striking or dredged material; and
